acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent acquisition mode
alkylation reagent: the reduction and alkylation steps were performed by incubation with 10 mM DTT and 55 mM IAA
alkylation concentration: the reduction and alkylation steps were performed by incubation with 10 mM DTT and 55 mM IAA
cleavage agent: the dry gel pieces were re-hydrated in a 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate solution containing 10 ng/L trypsin
collision energy: CID was performed using helium as collision gas at a normalized collision energy of 40%
enrichment method: the fractions with POD activity were then affinity-separated using a Concanavalin A column
fractionation method: In subsequent 1D-GE/nanoLC-MSMS analyses we identified various protein candidates
fragmentation method: subsequent CID and PQD MS/MS scans in the linear ion trap
instrument: coupled to a linear ion trap LTQ Velos mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nano electrospray ion source
labeling: the peptides were separated by a 60 min gradient method at a flow rate of 400 nL/min.
reduction reagent: the reduction and alkylation steps were performed by incubation with 10 mM DTT
reduction concentration: the reduction and alkylation steps were performed by incubation with 10 mM DTT
